answer:
The correct answer is based on PL/I default rules: undeclared names starting with I–N default to FIXED BINARY REAL, others to FLOAT DECIMAL REAL. PERCENT starts with P, so it defaults to FLOAT DECIMAL REAL with precision based on name length (8 → FLOAT(6) or similar); AMOUNT starts with A, so FIXED DECIMAL with default precision; NUMBER starts with N, so FIXED BINARY; TOTAL starts with T, so FLOAT DECIMAL; INCANT starts with I, so FIXED BINARY. Comparing options, only A matches these patterns correctly.

\boxed{A}
